# BICKOSA

Bishop Cipriano Kihangire Old Students Association — the official alumni website for former students of Bishop Cipriano Kihangire Senior Secondary School (BCK SSS), Bbiina/Luzira, Kampala, Uganda.

This project is open source and hosted in a public organisation/repository; contributions are welcome (see CONTRIBUTING.md and LICENSE).

## Purpose

Preserving legacy, building community, and giving back. The site is a hub for alumni: events, stories, news, projects, governance, gallery, contact, and archive.

## Tech stack

- React 18, TypeScript, Vite 5
- React Router 6
- Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui (Radix)
- Design system: Bento grid (see docs/BENTO_STYLE.md); tokens: navy, gold, typography (display/sans/serif)

## Key URLs (paths)

- / — Home
- /about — About BICKOSA
- /school — BCK SSS (school info)
- /history — History & legacy
- /stories — Alumni stories
- /news — News & updates
- /events — Events
- /projects — Projects & giving
- /gallery — Gallery
- /contact — Contact
- /governance — Governance
- /faq — FAQs
- /archive — Archive

## Codebase layout

- src/pages/ — Route pages (Index, AboutPage, EventsPage, etc.)
- src/components/ — Layout, Header, Footer, PageHero; bento/ (BentoGrid, BentoCard); home/ (HeroSection, AboutSnapshot, etc.)
- src/config/metadata.ts — Per-page title, description, og:image for SEO/social
- src/styles/bento.css — Bento grid and card classes (bc-*, section-eyebrow, section-heading)
- public/meta/ — OG images (home.png, about.png, …)
- docs/BENTO_STYLE.md — Design system (colors, cards, typography, layout)

## For agents

- Use BentoCard and BentoGrid from @/components/bento for content blocks; follow section-eyebrow → section-heading → section-sub for sections.
- Page-level meta (title, description, og) is driven by src/config/metadata.ts and PageMeta (react-helmet-async).
- Default site URL: https://bickosa.com (overridable via VITE_SITE_URL).
- Repository: https://github.com/BICKOSA/bickosa-website
